metadata.title: Quantum computing — the full competitive landscape: modalities, the public pure-plays, the big-tech programs, and the US/China/EU/India/Japan race
metadata.status: company facts, funding, tickers, qubit counts and national-program figures are FACT (web-verified); the 'no settled winner / narrative-beta bubble' reading is graded interpretation; supremacy claims inherit the CONTESTED grade from macro-crqc-quantum-landscape
metadata.frame: The companion to macro-crqc-quantum-landscape (which covers the Q-Day clock, HNDL/TNFL, and the PQC counter-migration). THIS block is the entity map: WHO is building quantum computers, by WHICH physical modality, with WHOSE money, in WHICH country — and where the engineering is real vs. where the equity is narrative-beta. The organizing spine is the MODALITY (no architecture has won yet — that uncertainty is itself the investment risk). Pairs with macro-quantum-computing (equities) and fin-sealsq-wisekey-global / macro-pqc-chips (the PQC silicon side).

the_modality_spine: Quantum computing is not one technology — it is six-plus competing physical bets, none yet dominant. The race is as much WHICH QUBIT as WHICH COMPANY. (1) SUPERCONDUCTING transmons — fastest gates (ns) but short coherence (µs), needs millikelvin dilution fridges: IBM, Google, Rigetti, IQM (Finland), Fujitsu, and China's USTC (Zuchongzhi) + Origin Quantum. (2) TRAPPED IONS — superb coherence (s) and fidelity but slow gates (ms): IonQ, Quantinuum (Honeywell), Oxford Ionics (now IonQ), AQT, eleQtron, Universal Quantum. (3) PHOTONIC — room-temperature, networking-native, manufacturable on existing fabs, but probabilistic gates: PsiQuantum, Xanadu (Canada), Quandela (France), Orca, and China's USTC (Jiuzhang). (4) NEUTRAL-ATOM / Rydberg arrays — highly scalable, strong for logical qubits: QuEra, Pasqal (France), Atom Computing, Infleqtion, planqc, M Squared. (5) TOPOLOGICAL — Microsoft's long-shot Majorana bet (Majorana 1, 2025), potentially error-resistant but physically unproven. (6) QUANTUM ANNEALING — D-Wave, optimization-only, not universal/gate-based. Plus spin/diamond-NV (Quantum Brilliance, Diraq) and the cloud aggregators that resell all of the above (Amazon Braket, Azure Quantum, Nvidia CUDA-Q / DGX Quantum). The honest read: a portfolio of unsettled physics, not a product category.

the_public_pure_plays.grade: tickers/revenue/valuation FACT; the valuation-vs-revenue gap is the bubble signal
the_public_pure_plays.fact: The listed quantum pure-plays trade on narrative, not cash flows. IonQ (IONQ) is the largest by revenue — ~$130M 2025 sales, 2026 guidance $225-245M — and the most acquisitive (below). Rigetti (RGTI, superconducting) posted Q1-2026 revenue of just ~$4.4M. D-Wave (QBTS, annealing) and Quantum Computing Inc (QUBT) are smaller still. Quantinuum (Honeywell majority-owned, trapped-ion) filed to IPO at a ~$12.7B valuation (2026). The structural fact: multi-billion-dollar market caps sit on single-digit-to-low-hundreds-of-millions of revenue — classic narrative-beta (the same 800x-sales pattern flagged for SEALSQ/WISeKey in macro-crqc). A May-2026 ~$931M warning and sharp drawdowns across IONQ/RGTI/QBTS underline the volatility.
the_public_pure_plays.consolidation: IonQ is rolling up the trapped-ion + sensing field: acquired Oxford Ionics (UK, semiconductor-compatible ion traps) for ~$1.075B (announced Jun 2025, closed Sep 2025) and announced intent to acquire Vector Atomic (quantum sensing). Roadmap: 256 high-fidelity qubits 2026, >10,000 physical 2027, 2M by 2030. Note the geopolitics: a UK quantum champion (Oxford Ionics) was absorbed by a US firm — UK invents, US acquires.

the_big_tech_programs.grade: roadmaps/chips FACT; supremacy claims CONTESTED (see macro-crqc Trail-of-Bits)
the_big_tech_programs.IBM: The 'realest' large-cap program: public roadmap Condor/Heron -> 'Starling' fault-tolerant target ~2029; IBM Quantum Network; Heron processors deployed externally (e.g. RIKEN Kobe).
the_big_tech_programs.Google: Willow chip; random-circuit-sampling 'advantage' claims repeatedly narrowed/spoofed; its zero-knowledge proof of quantum cryptanalysis was FORGED by Trail of Bits (Apr 2026). Also a QuEra investor (neutral-atom hedge).
the_big_tech_programs.Microsoft: Two bets: the topological Majorana long-shot (Majorana 1, 2025) AND Azure Quantum reselling/partnering — joint logical-qubit demos with Quantinuum (2024) and Atom Computing (neutral-atom partnership).
the_big_tech_programs.Amazon: Ocelot cat-qubit chip + Braket cloud aggregator (resells IonQ, Rigetti, QuEra, IQM, etc.).
the_big_tech_programs.Nvidia: Not a qubit-maker but the connective tissue: CUDA-Q / DGX Quantum hybrid stack, NVentures stakes in PsiQuantum and Quantinuum, and the RIKEN AI+quantum supercomputers — positioning to be the orchestration layer over every modality (the same 'sell shovels to all sides' play as in AI compute).

the_national_race.grade: program figures + milestones FACT; the 'state-as-shareholder' and 'comms-vs-compute split' readings labeled
the_national_race.United_States: National Quantum Initiative ~$1.2B (2019-24) + ~$1.8B reauthorization (2025-29); DARPA Quantum Benchmarking Initiative / US2QC (PsiQuantum to Phase 3, Nov 2025). NEW and significant: reports (May 2026) that the US will award ~$2B to quantum firms AND TAKE EQUITY STAKES — the same state-as-shareholder pattern seen with MP Materials (DoD) and the Intel stake, now extended to IonQ/Rigetti/D-Wave-class companies. Quantum stocks spiked on the news. grade: program fact; equity-stake details still reported/contested.
the_national_race.China: Leads quantum COMMUNICATIONS (Micius satellites, ~12,000 km network) and is now matching the West on superconducting COMPUTE: USTC's Zuchongzhi 3.0 (105 qubits, 2025) claims random-circuit sampling ~10^15x faster than the top supercomputer and ~10^6x past Google's Oct-2024 Willow result; the photonic Jiuzhang line (255-photon Jiuzhang-3, 2023; Jiuzhang 4.0 targeting 2,000+ photons). Origin Quantum is the commercial national champion — Wukong cloud (20M+ visits, 339k jobs) and the 180-qubit Wukong-180 (2026). China raised ~CNY 2.2B in Q1-2026 alone (near the full-2025 total); the 15th Five-Year Plan (2026-30) names quantum FIRST among seven strategic 'future industries' (fault-tolerant general-purpose + space-ground comms + precision measurement). Backed by a 1T-yuan (~$138B) national VC guidance fund spanning AI/quantum/H2.
the_national_race.European_Union: Quantum Flagship EUR1B (2018-28) + the 2026 AGILE defense plan folding quantum into the European Armaments Technology Roadmap. The EU has the deepest bench of independent pure-plays: IQM (Finland, superconducting), Pasqal (France, neutral-atom — going public via a Bleichroeder SPAC, ~$300M+ raised, ~100% 2025 revenue growth, ~$80M booked), Quandela (France, photonic), Alice & Bob (France, cat-qubit superconducting), OQC (UK), Quandela/Orca. Risk: strong science, thin capital vs. US/China — and champions get acquired out (Oxford Ionics -> IonQ).
the_national_race.United_Kingdom: National Quantum Strategy GBP2.5B (2024-34) + GBP2B procurement/scaling (Mar 2026). Players: Oxford Ionics (acquired by IonQ), OQC, Riverlane (quantum error-correction), Quantinuum's UK roots (Cambridge Quantum).
the_national_race.Japan: Deepest commercial-hardware footprint in Asia ex-China: RIKEN runs a hybrid quantum-HPC platform with Quantinuum's 'Reimei' (H1) system, an IBM 156-qubit Heron at Kobe, and Fujitsu superconducting machines (256-qubit 2025 -> 1,000-qubit target 2026); Nvidia+RIKEN supercomputers for AI+quantum; a 5-year U-Tokyo/Osaka/SoftBank hybrid project.
the_national_race.India: National Quantum Mission (target 50-1,000-qubit systems by 2031); demonstrated a ~1,000 km quantum-communication link (2026) via QNu Labs/VIAVI; a domestic quantum chip announced May 2026; Andhra Pradesh state targets three modalities + 1,000 logical qubits 2026-29.
the_national_race.others: Australia (~A$1B Queensland+federal anchoring PsiQuantum's Brisbane utility-scale site; also Silicon Quantum Computing, Diraq, Quantum Brilliance); Canada (Xanadu, D-Wave roots, NRC); Israel, South Korea, Singapore (Temasek/QIA as cross-border quantum capital). Global cumulative quantum investment has passed ~$50B.

the_manufacturing_chokepoint: The least-hyped, most-real node: photonic and some superconducting players depend on conventional semiconductor fabs. PsiQuantum's Omega silicon-photonic chipset is manufactured by GlobalFoundries on 300mm wafers in New York — i.e. the quantum supply chain runs through the SAME foundry chokepoints as classical chips (cf. macro-pqc-chips, the TSMC/GF dependency). Quantum 'utility scale' is gated by fab capacity, dilution-refrigerator supply, rare-earth/helium-3, and cryo-electronics — physical bottlenecks the equity story rarely prices.
the_honest_reading: Three honest conclusions. (1) The engineering is REAL and accelerating — IBM/Google roadmaps, IonQ/Quantinuum trapped-ion fidelity, neutral-atom logical-qubit records (QuEra's 96 logical qubits from 448 atoms, Nature, Jan 2026), photonic fault-tolerance bets — but NO modality has won, so company-level winner-picking is genuinely premature. (2) The EQUITY is largely narrative-beta: multi-billion caps on single-digit-millions of revenue, the SEALSQ/WISeKey pattern generalized; separate the builders (IBM, Google, IonQ, Quantinuum, PsiQuantum, the neutral-atom cohort) from the pure-play lottery tickets. (3) The state has entered as SHAREHOLDER and as customer on BOTH sides — US equity stakes + DARPA, China's $138B fund + national champions, EU/UK/India/Japan programs — turning quantum into an instrument of industrial policy and a HNDL/TNFL national-security race at once. The bubble and the breakthrough are the same companies; the discipline is to grade each claim, not the sector. Overlay edges excluded from the formal proofs.
